skill.name: fal-audio
skill.description: Text-to-speech and speech-to-text using fal.ai audio models
skill.summary: Text-to-speech and speech-to-text using fal.ai audio models
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a documentation-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis flagged URLs and cryptographic patterns, but evaluation confirms these are false positives. The URLs are markdown hyperlinks in documentation, and the 'cryptographic algorithm' detection was triggered by the word 'text' in the description.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URL in Documentation
low_findings.description: Static scanner detected URL in SKILL.md lines 4 and 22. These are markdown hyperlinks in documentation, not executable network requests.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: These are markdown hyperlinks in documentation, not network calls made by any code. No executable code exists in this skill.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: Static scanner incorrectly flagged 'cryptographic algorithm' at lines 3 and 20. This is a false positive triggered by pattern matching on the word 'text' in 'text-to-speech'.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: No cryptographic algorithms present. This is documentation text containing the phrase 'text-to-speech' which triggered a false positive.

content.user_title: Convert Text to Speech with Fal.ai
content.value_statement: This skill enables Claude to work with text-to-speech and speech-to-text capabilities using fal.ai audio models, providing patterns and guidance for audio generation and transcription tasks.
actual_capabilities: Generate speech from text using fal.ai TTS models
Transcribe speech to text using fal.ai STT models
Provide guidance on audio model selection
Offer patterns for integrating fal.ai audio services
limitations: Requires fal.ai API key for actual service calls
This is a guidance skill - no direct API integration code
Audio processing happens on fal.ai infrastructure

use_cases.title: Voiceover Generation
use_cases.description: Generate voiceover audio for videos, podcasts, or accessibility content

use_cases.title: Audio Transcription
use_cases.description: Convert spoken audio to text for transcription, subtitles, or analysis

use_cases.title: Accessibility Features
use_cases.description: Add text-to-speech capabilities to applications for accessibility

prompt_templates.title: Basic TTS Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to generate speech from the following text: [YOUR TEXT HERE]

prompt_templates.title: Speech Transcription
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to transcribe this audio file to text: [AUDIO FILE OR URL]

prompt_templates.title: Voice Style Selection
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to recommend appropriate voice settings for a [TYPE OF CONTENT] project
prompt_templates.scenario: Getting guidance on voice model selection

prompt_templates.title: Batch Audio Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-audio skill to create a process for converting multiple text segments to audio files

output_examples.input: Generate a friendly greeting for a mobile app using fal-audio
output_examples.output: The skill provides guidance on selecting an appropriate voice model, recommended text structure for TTS, and how to format the request for the fal.ai API.

output_examples.input: Transcribe this podcast episode to text
output_examples.output: The skill outlines the steps for using fal.ai speech-to-text, including audio format requirements and API parameters for optimal transcription accuracy.

best_practices: Provide clear, well-structured text for better speech synthesis results
Specify the target use case to help select appropriate voice models
Test with short text samples before processing longer content
anti_patterns: Do not assume the skill makes actual API calls - it provides guidance only
Do not expect audio processing to happen locally
Do not skip API key configuration for fal.ai services

faq.question: Does this skill make actual API calls to fal.ai?
faq.answer: No. This is a guidance skill that provides patterns and recommendations for working with fal.ai audio models.

faq.question: Do I need an API key?
faq.answer: Yes. You will need a fal.ai API key to make actual text-to-speech or speech-to-text requests.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: fal.ai audio models support multiple languages. The specific capabilities depend on the model version.

faq.question: Can this skill process audio files?
faq.answer: The skill provides guidance for speech-to-text transcription but actual processing happens via fal.ai API.

faq.question: Is the audio generated locally?
faq.answer: No. Audio generation and transcription are performed by fal.ai's cloud infrastructure.

faq.question: How do I integrate this with my application?
faq.answer: Use the patterns from this skill to call the fal.ai API with appropriate parameters for your use case.
